title: スキーマとマイグレーション
description: Weaver ORM generates SQL DDL directly from your mapper classes. The SchemaGenerator reads every registered mapper, converts it into a Doctrine DBAL Schema object, and can create, update, or drop your database schema through a set of Symfony console commands.
